title: Neowilliamsia nervosiflora
taxonomy: Neowilliamsia nervosiflora is a genus of flowering plants in the family Ericaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Andes. This genus was previously classified under the family Gesneriaceae, but it is now accepted as part of the Ericaceae family. Neowilliamsia nervosiflora has a unique classification that reflects its distinct characteristics and evolutionary history. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and relationships of this genus within the plant kingdom.
